title: A10-RPT Feasibility-Diagnostic Rocket-Propulsion Surrogate
central_claim: feasibility-diagnostic reduced-surrogate theory, not engine design or hardware control

table6.interpretation: Controller-feasible under suitable A10 barrier variants.
Supply-resource-frontier feasible; recommended surrogate condition S≈1.55.
High-cooling near-feasible thermal frontier; rare residual thermal exceedance remains near C≈2.50.
Severe thermal-limited near-frontier under the tested family; unresolved at target failure rate 0.05.

claim_boundary: No engine-design, propulsion-performance prediction, flight hardware, hazardous experiment, or safety certification claim.
